Poseidon2b_n32t16:

n = 32
t = 16
rF = 8
rP = 15
r = 23
alpha = 7

Binary extension field properties:
Galois Field:
  name: GF(2^32)
  characteristic: 2
  degree: 32
  order: 4294967296
  irreducible_poly: x^32 + x^15 + x^9 + x^7 + x^4 + x^3 + 1
  is_primitive_poly: True
  primitive_element: x
